name: Strawberry Vinegar
short_description: A cute comedy yuri VN about a gluttonous demon and a cynical young girl centered around the most important thing in life: food! ♥
detailed_description:
"Feed me, or I'll reap your soul!"
And with those ridiculous words, my whole life was turned upside down.

Sakuraba Rie, aged nine, is a cynical and grumpy girl who doesn't get along with her classmates. Rie is so haughty, she doesn't have a single friend. This all changes, however, when a self-proclaimed demon from the deepest, darkest pits of Hell suddenly appears in her kitchen to steal a tray of cookies.

What will happen between Rie and her demonic companion? Will Rie be able to forge a friendship with Licia, the cookie-stealing demon, or perhaps something more?

That's up for the reader to decide!




  • 80k worth of text (approx 4-7 hours of reading)
  • An interactive story with numerous choices and endings
  • A romance or friendship ending with your cute demon companion
  • Expressive character sprites with multiple pretty outfits
  • Lots and lots of mouth-watering, high-quality images of food
  • One cute demon girl
  • One grumpy tsundere
  • Even more images of food! ♥
